Malevolent Greaves  
 

No Trade
Slot: LEGS
AC: 36
STR: +10 DEX: +5 STA: +3 HP: +60
SV FIRE: +1 SV DISEASE: +1 SV COLD: +1 SV MAGIC: +1 SV POISON: +1
WT: 7.0 Size: LARGE
Class: SHD
Race: ALL except BAR ELF HEF DWF HFL VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Malevolent Greaves
No Trade
Slot: LEGS
AC: 36
STR: +10 DEX: +5 STA: +3 HP: +60
SV FIRE: +1 SV DISEASE: +1 SV COLD: +1 SV MAGIC: +1 SV POISON: +1
WT: 7.0 Size: LARGE
Class: SHD
Race: ALL except BAR ELF HEF DWF HFL VAH

Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Plate 2
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):100, 10, 10
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 08:29:12
Page Updated:Mon Oct 24th, 2016

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Shadowknight Kael Armor

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kael Drakkel

Wuz Zup

# Aug 31 2002 at 6:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780928360
1 post
Right now i got the SS leggings...but now i have the chance to get these bad boys, only problem is i dont know how to get to the quest giver with bad faction with Tormax. If any one could give directions i would love it.
▲ Page top
br greaves
QuoteReply
# Apr 19 2002 at 8:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362043561
59 posts
I'd give up my blood runed greaves for these, but hard to justify requesting the plate leg drop when the war/pal/clr can make better use of it than a sk can.
▲ Page top
RE: br greaves
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2002 at 9:05 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757765879
Scholar
23 posts
Especially when compaired to SS these are crap unless the rest of your gear blows. If you can get these pants, you are prolly over 1200AC and 255str buffed; every other stat on these pales when put side by side. Less hps, no mana, less resists (negligible as they may be), the 5 extra dex on these isn't gonna make the kind of difference that 9int/30mana on the SS will make to your pool. The Thurg pants even have a few more hps on them then the Kael.

If your guild won't award you SS pants in HoT, save your coppers and buy a MQ before you change factions if you are lucky enough to find one for sale. Odds are you aren't going to have a pants upgrade for a while after you get these.

▲ Page top
RE: br greaves
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2002 at 11:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248063898
9 posts
kael armor sucks for SKs honestly, SS is much better or cultural is higher AC, more HPs/Mana.
=p

#Anonymous, Posted: May 17 2001 at 9:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This thing screams M-O-N-K baby yeah!
#Anonymous, Posted: May 11 2001 at 2:38 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I actually consider newbies to be be people who use words like n00b. (d00d, dr00d, plz, thx, wtf, stfu). Kind of puts a damper on my fantasy roleplaying. Why people purposefully spell things wrong is beyond me. It's like people are boycotting the 's' key for some infraction it committed and hiring the z instead. Oh, well. You all can act like 'n00bz' if you want.
RE: Ahmenhotep

#REDACTED, Posted: May 11 2001 at 1:42 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) there are plenty of people that have these greaves that i have seen, and just because someone posted it here doesnt mean they got it first. most people dont care enough, obviously if the quest has been posted here LONG before this pic was submitted, then someone already had them long ago. so, in conclusion your an obvios n00b.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 11 2001 at 12:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) to the guy who said that he's friend got this first, i can say that who's gonna believe you and youre friend if he didnt post this item?
#Anonymous, Posted: May 10 2001 at 7:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) God, this is nice. The Kael and SS stuff is probably way better too. God, why can't the caster quest stuff be good like this? For the Enchanter stuff I've seen, it's mostly all CRAP, except for robe and a few other pieces. Really discourages me when i see awesome stuff like this and such crap for casters.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 10 2001 at 7:57 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Let's see.. If they gave ENchanter's 36 AC leggings, that would just be flat out stupid. Then they would have to give all the casters 36 AC Leggings, and pure fighters like, 140 AC legs. And second, this IS the Kael stuff. The Kael stuff can't be better than this when it IS the Kael stuff.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 11 2001 at 6:33 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Umm i didnt mean that at all. I meant that caster gear needs more stuff that would benefit casters. AC on em is fine for casters, but the +mana +hp +int +cha (for enc) and +resists are awful when compared to the amount of good melee stats str, sta agi ac hp etc. on the melee gear.
Very Good

These are very nice...i have a Grave Lord friend who got these greaves along with the arms about a month ago...so Aerylin isn't the first...no where near it in fact.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 10 2001 at 8:00 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Who ever said Aerylin was the first to have these? They might of been the first people who sent in a pic. Or, in another case, maybe they didn't distribute pics right away. Ever think of that dip ****? See, not everyone gets an item and runs around saying,"Now I can be the first person to submit it to a web page and be the first person to have it!" Some people have things called LIVES which you obviously don't. I can tell from reading the 4 lines you wrote that you are about as smart as a rock.
